heading: Prerequisites
body:
Install and configure multiple authentication factors.**Okta:**Okta Verify Mobile AppDownload the Okta Verify app to your
[iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app//okta-verify/id490179405) or
[Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.okta.android.auth) device.**Webauthn:**Security Key / BiometricInstall and configure a FIDO2 (Fast Identity Online version 2) compatible device (like a
YubiKey) or operating system feature (like Windows Hello).> **Note:** FIDO2 (Fast Identity Online version 2) compatibility varies. It depends on your platform
> and browser. Consult [Okta's documentation](https://help.okta.com/en/prod/Content/Topics/Security/mfa-webauthn.htm#WebAuthn2)
> before choosing this method.**Authapp:**Authenticator AppDownload an Authenticator App (for example, Google Authenticator
or Microsoft Authenticator) to your iOS or Android device.**Email:**Email* Verify the email address you used to sign up for your MongoDB
  account.

* Verify that this email address can receive email from the
  `mongodb.com` domain.
